text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
46 
MDCD_OTHR_MC_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicaid — Other (non-Comprehensive) Managed Care Medicaid Coverage Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year when the beneficiary had some type of 
Medicaid managed care coverage, however it was not comprehensive medical managed care 
coverage. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS DE file (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment)
